{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053052B69101385A533375893B"}"},"total":2313},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7408956557297681176","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，写的真的好，我看过n多本末世小说，基本上都是看一百章，等主角出了小区，开始有各种异能之类的就开始看不下去了，就这一本，讲的十分真实，而且还有让人看下去的欲望，算是我看过的末世文里最好的一本了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725033950,"group_id":"7199174309883939840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZccsMz2cEeGB0i9DeiLowGMYc3iViStqXB3rR+QlCS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1016409400813624","user_name":"yeye的小跟班"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1016409400813624","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7199174309883939840","book_info":{"abstract":"简介: 【末世+天灾+避难所+囤物资】【同名漫动画已经上线，大家可以去看看哦】
       这场末日来的突然，小行星撞击地球，带来了一系列灾难，海啸，火山爆发，酸雨，地震，高温，极寒。
        张巡管不了其他人，只求让自己和家人能够安然地度过这一生！ 没有轰轰烈烈，只求平平安安！
       没有空间，没有异能，没有变异病毒，没有装比打脸，也没有后宫。
      （主角得到了前世记忆，解锁了钞能力，前期打造避难所和囤积物资会写的详细些，有些地方会有些逻辑性问题，希望谅解，毕竟作者也不是专业的。很多小说的末世避难所引入了传说中的系统或者高级文明智慧，不少东西都是一带而过，没有啥具体建造过程，所以本书会偏重于建，也不会很长，写到主角生命结束，也就完结了，主角只为生存下去，仅此而已！不是爽文！不是爽文！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob7156eb3e889cf608f7e3349b1a199b0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"农村老狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7199174309883939840","book_name":"末世，山里的避难所","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7199174681935643174","read_count":"35232","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"358718"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"150","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,单女主,开局,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eea9878ff96896f5f38387c0298641a4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312652&x-signature=JKtIMqmnbhgVvUjzXgFh5%2Fk5nKU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"67459000317","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"187"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053052B69101385A533375893B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8936,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7394},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7320974778863682358","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一看就是湖北老乡写的书，怎么说呢，这是迄今为止感受最为深刻，逻辑最为严谨，知识面最完善的末日小说，很好看，虽然没有什么丧尸文让人情绪起起伏伏，但这个末日生活可以说最真实，让人很有代入感，作者文笔很好，逻辑通顺，是真实末日生活里面最好看的一本书了，加油，可以尝试写写丧尸类的热文，提升热榜，文笔，逻辑都这么好，不能浪费你的天赋，继续加油[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":48,"s":44,"text":"末日小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741286523375893B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227320974778863682358%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227199174309883939840%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704547997,"group_id":"7199174309883939840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5EnBO4Gydj2hA8l+J3fnNU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705984&x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"55389872602","user_name":"用户名8633804"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"55389872602","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7199174309883939840","book_info":{"abstract":"简介: 【末世+天灾+避难所+囤物资】【同名漫动画已经上线，大家可以去看看哦】
       这场末日来的突然，小行星撞击地球，带来了一系列灾难，海啸，火山爆发，酸雨，地震，高温，极寒。
        张巡管不了其他人，只求让自己和家人能够安然地度过这一生！ 没有轰轰烈烈，只求平平安安！
       没有空间，没有异能，没有变异病毒，没有装比打脸，也没有后宫。
      （主角得到了前世记忆，解锁了钞能力，前期打造避难所和囤积物资会写的详细些，有些地方会有些逻辑性问题，希望谅解，毕竟作者也不是专业的。很多小说的末世避难所引入了传说中的系统或者高级文明智慧，不少东西都是一带而过，没有啥具体建造过程，所以本书会偏重于建，也不会很长，写到主角生命结束，也就完结了，主角只为生存下去，仅此而已！不是爽文！不是爽文！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob7156eb3e889cf608f7e3349b1a199b0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"农村老狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7199174309883939840","book_name":"末世，山里的避难所","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7199174681935643174","read_count":"35232","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"358718"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"150","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,单女主,开局,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eea9878ff96896f5f38387c0298641a4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312652&x-signature=JKtIMqmnbhgVvUjzXgFh5%2Fk5nKU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"67459000317","extra":{"comment_jump 更是引发人们深思，和对未来的考量。
看似平淡如水，但这本书表达出来的东西却是很深沉。它带给我们的有更深层的思考和崭新的意义。

       这场末日来的突然，小行星撞击地球，带来了一系列灾难，海啸，火山爆发，酸雨，地震，高温，极寒。
        张巡管不了其他人，只求让自己和家人能够安然地度过这一生！ 没有轰轰烈烈，只求平平安安！
